dashboard.label: SOC Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Portfolio dashboard for monitoring detections in the Splunk Detection Lab.

search.query: index=windows (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" OR sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" OR sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security") (EventCode=4104 OR EventCode=4688) | eval raw_cmd=coalesce(CommandLine, Process_Command_Line, ScriptBlockText, Message) | eval process_name=coalesce(New_Process_Name, ProcessName, Image, process_name) | search raw_cmd=* | eval encoded_flag=if(match(lower(raw_cmd), "(^|\\s)-e(nc|ncodedcommand)?(\\s|$)"), 1, 0) | eval hidden_flag=if(match(lower(raw_cmd), "(^|\\s)-w(indowstyle)?\\s+hidden"), 1, 0) | eval bypass_flag=if(match(lower(raw_cmd), "executionpolicy\\s+bypass"), 1, 0) | eval download_flag=if(match(lower(raw_cmd), "downloadstring|invoke-webrequest|iwr\\s|wget\\s|curl\\s"), 1, 0) | eval suspicious_score=encoded_flag + hidden_flag + bypass_flag + download_flag | where suspicious_score >= 2 OR (match(lower(process_name), "powershell(.exe)?|pwsh(.exe)?") AND suspicious_score >= 1) | eval severity=case(suspicious_score>=3,"critical", suspicious_score=2,"high", suspicious_score=1,"medium", true(),"low") | table _time host user process_name suspicious_score severity | sort - _time
index=linux ("Failed password" AND "sshd") | rex field=_raw "Failed password for (invalid user )?(?[^\s]+) from (?\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})" | stats count by src_ip | sort - count

index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4648 OR EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4688) | eval account=coalesce(Account_Name, TargetUserName, user) | eval src_ip=coalesce(Source_Network_Address, IpAddress, WorkstationName) | eval process_name=coalesce(Process_Name, New_Process_Name, process_name) | eval command_line=coalesce(CommandLine, Process_Command_Line, Message) | eval explicit_creds=if(EventCode=4648,1,0) | eval remote_logon=if(EventCode=4624 AND (LogonType=3 OR LogonType=9 OR LogonType=10),1,0) | eval admin_tool=if(match(lower(command_line), "psexec|wmic|winrs|mstsc|powershell"),1,0) | stats sum(explicit_creds) as explicit_creds sum(remote_logon) as remote_logons values(process_name) as processes by src_ip account | eval suspicious_score=explicit_creds + remote_logons + admin_tool | where suspicious_score >= 2 | eval severity=case(suspicious_score>=4,"critical", suspicious_score=3,"high", suspicious_score=2,"medium", true(),"low") | table src_ip account explicit_creds remote_logons processes suspicious_score severity | sort - suspicious_score
index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4648 OR EventCode=4688) | timechart span=1h count by EventCode
